name: Benchmarking Unlearning for Vision Transformers

description: arXiv:2602.20114v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Machine unlearning (MU) refers to the post-training capability to remove (the influence of) training examples that are incorrect, biased, or leak sensitive/private information. MU is now widely regarded as critical for building safe and fair AI. In parallel, research into transformer architectures for computer vision has been highly succ...
author: Kairan Zhao, Iurie Luca, Peter Triantafillou
